name: Handmade Velvet Potli Bag Collection
description: Elegant ethnic potli bags in rich velvet with intricate gold lace, zari trim, and beaded handles—perfect for weddings and festive occasions. Assorted colours available.

name: Velvet Pearl-Embellished Potli Purse
description: Handmade velvet potli purse with gold lace, pearl beadwork, and a gold beaded handle. Drawstring closure with tassels. Available in red, purple, green, cream, maroon, pink, and more.

name: Embroidered Silk Satin Zip Pouches
description: Shimmering silk-satin zip pouches with rich gold-thread floral and vine embroidery. Assorted colours—sky blue, red, cream, yellow, magenta, green, maroon and more.

name: Floral 2-Chain Zip Pouch (9×5 inch)
description: Cream canvas-style pouch with magenta florals and green vines; dual compartment with metal zip. Approx. 9×5 inch. Perfect for daily essentials.

name: Floral Embroidered Zip Pouch — Six Colours
description: Small rectangular zippered pouches with matching floral embroidery—pink, orange, and green details on yellow, green, pink, cream, red, and beige bases.

name: Traditional Motif Zip Clutch Set
description: Four handcrafted zip clutches featuring paisley, birds, elephants, and peacocks with vibrant Indian-inspired embroidery on a light base.

name: Silk Floral Embroidered Pouch — Duo
description: Two slim silk-finish pouches—blush pink and cream—with pink blooms, gold vines, and side zippers. Ideal for gifting or festive wear.

name: Madhubani-Style Folk Art Canvas Pouches
description: Pair of cream canvas pouches with hand-painted folk motifs—peacock on branch and floral vines—with side zip closures.

name: Peacock Folk Art Vertical Zip Pouch
description: Single vertical pouch in Madhubani-inspired style—multicolour peacock among red branches and lotus blooms on textured cream cotton. Side zip.

name: Embroidered Silk Clutch — Four Designs
description: Collection of zip-top clutches: gold wave stitch on champagne, peach floral, off-white with magenta florals, and ice-blue with dense gold floral embroidery.

name: Warli Print Bag Set — Six Styles
description: Handmade Warli tribal art totes and zip pouches on white base—orange, green, pink, and red trims. Dancing figures, animals, and village scenes. Assorted handle colours.

name: Floral Embroidered Mini Totes — Five Colours
description: Small open-top tote bags with sequinned floral embroidery—red, pink, magenta, lime, and beige. Matching fabric handles. Perfect for gifting and festive wear.

name: Embroidered Floral Mini Tote — Maroon Zip
description: Off-white ribbed satin-finish tote with maroon and pink florals, gold vines, maroon satin handles, and top zip. Slightly tapered silhouette.

name: Red Floral Embroidered Zip Tote
description: Vibrant red tote with pink and gold floral embroidery, sequin accents, matching red handles and zip. Compact flared shape.

name: Red Floral Handbag with Sequin Detail
description: Bright red handbag with layered floral embroidery in pink, white, and gold, silver sequin highlights, short handles and zip closure.

name: Warli Art Tote & Pouch Collection
description: Six Warli-print bags on neutral backdrop—twin totes with orange and green bases, zip pouches in pink, red, and purple trims. Classic tribal motifs.

name: Cream Floral Tote — Peach Handles
description: Cream ribbed fabric with pink, maroon, and gold floral embroidery, peach satin handles, and orange zip pull. Trapeze mini-tote style.

name: Gold Vine Floral Embroidered Tote
description: Cream tote with metallic gold vines, pink and red blooms, green leaves, and gold sequins. Matching cream handles and zip.

name: Madhubani Peacock Canvas Tote — Yellow Zip
description: Canvas tote with folk-art peacock and tree in bold colours, yellow handles and zipper, thin yellow border frame.

name: Warli Print Tote — Blue Handles
description: White cotton tote with multicolour Warli print—dancers, elephant, deer, and trees. Bright blue fabric handles and zip trim.

name: Cream Floral Embroidered Totes — Five Designs
description: Five cream silk-finish mini totes with gold vines and multicolour florals—each with unique embroidery layout. Twin handles and zip tops.

name: Royal Blue Gold-Embroidered Potli Bag
description: Traditional potli in rich royal blue silk satin with dense gold zari embroidery, beaded petal accents, gold bead border, and multi-strand gold bead handles. Cream drawstring with gold latkan tassels.
